name: source-boundary-caution
scenario: The user asks for author intent that the selected text does not prove.

input.selectedText: The narrator pauses before the door and listens to the house settle.
input.chapterContext: The scene occurs before a confrontation.
input.userQuestion: 作者是不是在暗示童年创伤？

answerMust: say the selected text alone does not establish childhood trauma
offer a conditional inference if supported by the chapter context
name what additional evidence would matter

readingMemory.reason: source-boundary clarification is useful in chat but not automatically durable
